basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 07 Assistant Banking Associate/Banking Attendant Cadre Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jammu and Kashmir Bank Limited (J&K Bank), Corporate Headquarters, M.A. Road, Srinagar
basic_details.post_name: Football Players (Assistant Banking Associate / Banking Attendant)
basic_details.job_location: J&K Bank (selection trials/interview at Jammu and/or Srinagar)
basic_details.short_information: J&K Bank Recruitment 2026: Get the latest J&K Bank recruitment notification 2026 for 7 Football Player vacancies under the Sports Quota in Assistant Banking Associate and Banking Attendant cadre at Jammu and Kashmir Bank Limited. The online application process starts on 11th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 25th May 2026. Find J&K Bank Football Player vacancies for the J&K Bank Football Team on the official website jkbank.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming J&K Bank Sports Quota Recruitment 2026" notifications for eligible sportspersons from J&K and Ladakh. Also know

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified via email (at Jammu and/or Srinagar)

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee online during the application process.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 01.01.2026. Upper age relaxation is available for SC/ST candidates as per bank rules. | Age Relaxation:

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, sports qualification, and domicile requirements. At the time of appointment, the candidate must be an active sportsperson and should be fit enough to take part in future tournaments. | Educational Qualification (Post-Wise): | Sports Qualification (Mandatory): | Candidate should be a Domicile of UT of J&K/Ladakh and must have represented in Football in any of the following: | Important Notes: | At the time of appointment, the candidate must be an active sportsperson and should be fit enough to take part in future tournaments Order of preference in appointment shall be in the sequence as enumerated above Performance of candidates in the previous two years will be given preference Candidate must be a Domicile of UT of J&K/Ladakh

salary_details.pay_scale: ABA: Rs. 24,050 - 64,480 | BAT: Rs. 19,500 - 37,815 (plus other perks)
salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed as regular employees of the bank and will receive pay scale plus other perks as admissible to regular employees. | Probation Period: | The persons recruited under sports quota shall be on initial probation period of 2 (two) years Candidates shall be confirmed in the services of the Bank after successful completion of probation period

selection_process: The selection process for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026 consists of Selection Trials followed by Interview conducted by the Sports Board of the Bank. The recruitment will be mainly on the basis of sports qualifications
suitable weightage will be given to this factor as well as the age of the candidates.

Selection Trials: Candidates possessing requisite qualifications will be called for selection trials to be conducted by the Sports Board of the Bank Interview: Candidates who qualify in selection trials for the discipline applied for will be called for interview at respective centres (Jammu and/or Srinagar) Merit List Preparation: Merit list of the candidates based on the marks obtained by them as per the selection criteria will be prepared in descending order for respective post and sport discipline Final Selection: Final selection will be made on the basis of merit list up to the number of vacancies
Selection will be made strictly on the basis of merit

determined under selection criteria of the Bank Recruitment mainly based on sports qualifications with suitable weightage Age of candidates will also be considered Performance of candidates in the previous two years will be given preference In case of equal marks obtained by two or more candidates
the merit order will be on the basis of Date of Birth (candidate junior/younger in age will be placed higher in the merit list)
Jammu and/or Srinagar Selection process shall be conducted by Sports Board of the Bank

The Bank shall reserve the right to restrict number of candidates to be called for interview Mere fulfilment of requisite qualifications will not confer any right on a candidate to be called for interview Candidates found suitable will be waitlisted Final selection will depend
medical fitness and verification of genuineness of sports certificates to the Bank's satisfaction
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Jammu and Kashmir Bank website (jkb.bank.in) under the Careers tab. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 11-05-2026 to 25-05-2026.
Steps to Apply Online:
Step 1: Visit Official Website - Go to jkb.bank.in → Careers Tab
Step 2: Click on Application Link - Click on the link for "Recruitment of Football Players for J&K Bank Football Team"
Step 3: Register/Login - Register with required details or login if already registered

Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form with all required details accurately: Personal details Educational qualifications Sports qualifications and achievements Contact details
Personal details
Educational qualifications
Sports qualifications and achievements
Contact details
Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of: Recent passport-size photograph Signature Educational certificates Sports certificates/achievements Domicile certificate of UT of J&K/Ladakh
Recent passport-size photograph
Signature
Educational certificates
Sports certificates/achievements
Domicile certificate of UT of J&K/Ladakh
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee of Rs. 500/- (Incl. of GST) online through available payment modes
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Take Printout - Take printout of submitted application for future reference
Important Notes:
Application fee: Rs. 500/- (Incl. of GST) per application
Keep registered Email-ID active - all future announcements/details will be communicated through registered Email-ID only
Intimation regarding selection trials/call letter for interview will be sent by email only - NO HARD COPY WILL BE SENT
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Recent passport-size photograph (as per specifications)
Signature (scanned)
10th/12th certificate and mark sheet (as applicable for post)
Sports certificates/achievements proving representation at International/National/State/District/University level in Football
Domicile certificate of UT of J&K/Ladakh
Category certificate (SC/ST if applicable)
Any other relevant documents
Apply Online at: jkb.bank.in (Careers Tab)
Contact Details for Queries:
Address: Human Resources, Corporate Headquarters, M.A. Road, Srinagar
Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: Candidate must be a Domicile of UT of J&K/Ladakh Age calculated as on 01.01.2026 - Banking Attendant: 18-30 years, Assistant Banking Associate: 20-28 years Upper age relaxation: up to 5 years for General/OBC/EWS sports persons, up to 10 years for SC/ST sports persons At the time of appointment, candidate must be an active sportsperson and should be fit enough to take part in future tournaments Order of preference in appointment as per International → National → State/District/University level representation Performance of candidates in the previous two years will be given preference Application fee: Rs. 500/- (Incl. of GST) per application is mandatory All future announcements/details will only be communicated through registered Email-ID of the candidate Intimation regarding selection trials/call letter for interview will be sent by email only - NO HARD COPY WILL BE SENT Candidates possessing requisite qualifications will be called for selection trials conducted by Sports Board of the Bank Candidates qualifying in selection trials will be called for interview at Jammu and/or Srinagar Mere fulfilment of requisite qualifications will not confer any right on a candidate to be called for interview The Bank shall reserve the right to restrict number of candidates to be called for interview Selection will be made strictly on the basis of merit determined under selection criteria of the Bank In case of equal marks, merit order will be based on Date of Birth (younger candidate placed higher) Final selection depends on verification of character & antecedents, medical fitness and verification of genuineness of sports certificates Shortlisted candidates will present themselves for trials and interview at designated venue at their own cost/expenses Persons recruited under sports quota shall be on initial probation period of 2 years Confirmation in services after successful completion of probation period Under no circumstances shall persons recruited under this quota be deputed to any other organization outside the Bank The Bank reserves the right to reject any application/candidature at any stage, cancel the whole process, or change the selection process upon exigencies or otherwise, without assigning any reason Other terms and conditions applicable as per rules of the Bank

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: J&K Bank has notified 7 vacancies for Football Players under the Sports Quota in Assistant Banking Associate and Banking Attendant cadre for the J&K Bank Football Team.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026 is open from 11 May 2026 to 25 May 2026, and candidates must apply through the official J&K Bank careers portal only.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for J&K Bank Football Players 2026?
faq.answer: For Assistant Banking Associate, candidates must have passed 12th standard from a recognised board, while for Banking Attendant, candidates must have passed 10th standard from a recognised board.

faq.question: Q4. Who can apply for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026 under Sports Quota?
faq.answer: Only domiciles of UT of J&K or Ladakh who have represented in football at international, national, state/UT, district or university level are eligible to apply under this sports quota recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What are the age limits for J&K Bank Football Player posts in 2026?
faq.answer: As on 01 January 2026, the age limit is 18 to 30 years for Banking Attendant and 20 to 28 years for Assistant Banking Associate, with upper age relaxations for eligible sports persons as per rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary of J&K Bank Football Players in ABA and BAT cadre?
faq.answer: Selected football players will receive pay as regular staff: ABA in the pay scale Rs. 24,050 – 64,480 and BAT in the pay scale Rs. 19,500 – 37,815, plus other admissible perks of J&K Bank employees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process comprises selection trials conducted by the Sports Board of the Bank, followed by an interview at Jammu and/or Srinagar for candidates who qualify in the trials.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for J&K Bank Football Player online form 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must pay a non‑refundable application fee of Rs. 500/- (including GST) per application while submitting the online form on the J&K Bank website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the probation period for J&K Bank Football Players selected under sports quota?
faq.answer: Candidates selected as Football Players under sports quota will be on an initial probation period of 2 years, after which they will be confirmed in the services of the Bank on successful completion.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible footballers must apply online from 11 to 25 May 2026 through the careers link on jkb.bank.in, fill the application form, upload documents (education, sports, domicile) and pay the fee to complete the submission.
